name: claude-pro-skills
description: Claude Pro Skills - A collection of Claude Code plugins and skills for productivity and development

plugins.name: skills-improver
plugins.description: Analyze conversation history to improve existing skills and plugins based on user feedback

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian note management with PARA method, MOCs, and formatting tools

plugins.name: mermaid
plugins.description: Create renderer-compatible Mermaid diagrams with human-readable ASCII sidecars

plugins.name: project-context
plugins.description: Maintain project context across sessions with structured markdown files, brainstorm-first workflow, context optimization (compact + organize), federated dependency graph for monorepos, and smart routing with session continuity.

plugins.name: agent-context
plugins.description: Capture and save agent conversation context with key points and learnings to .agent-context folder for transferring context between agent sessions

plugins.name: agent-config
plugins.description: Configure Claude Code plugin ecosystems with setup.yaml and SessionStart hooks for automatic team onboarding
